2026-06-01: Revalidated authored package against current official school-calendar examples. The page still correctly avoids inventing one pan-Arab spring-vacation date, explains naming and timing differences across systems, and guides families to the right local calendar path.

2026-06-01: Passed strict holiday content validation plus repo lint, typecheck, and SEO validation. Not marked done in the rollout checklist because generated holiday bundles were intentionally not rebuilt.
